reviews.review_description: The game is very fun i like the humor and they adapted the game to vr very well and Strengthened  how everything can be a weapon and this is definitely better than the console and PC port however i wish they adapted the year of the spider DLC

reviews.review_title: I LOVE THIS GAME SO MUCH
reviews.review_description: No explanation (I SUCK AT SPELLING) its such a good game.

I recently had a run-in with a spider in real life. It crawled up my arm from my pants that I was trying to put on after a shower. It scared me for a bit, but then my adrenaline started pumping. I killed the spider and felt so alive.

This game perfectly emulates that feeling, but on a way bigger level. The way your anticipation builds, the rush you feel after every kill, and then the want to do it again. It's exhilarating.
Its so fun getting to burn everyones property and kill everyone in a city with a nuke just to kill some spiders😍
they never made a second version of this game or update it.😢
Fun for about thirty minutes but then you beat the game and there's no replay value.
This game made me feel like the Doom Slayer of pest control. It even helped me with my arachnophobia.

This game is extremely fun because I have been waiting for a VR version of this game so far I have played all the kill it with fire games and I loved each one but now that I get to experience it in vr is even better so the reason I’m giving this four stars is because you can’t really reply at all unless you want to just go through all the levels you’ve already been through and there’s not that much weapons like the Original games ￼so overall I like the game very much I think it’s a very good touch to the series￼. reviews.review_title: The concept is good, execution is bad
reviews.review_description: I love the idea of this game, but the execution was sadly underwhelming. this game does have a few levels, however the very few levels this game has, are extremely repetitive. The concept of the game is finding spiders and exterminating them in super unnecessary ways, and unlocking new weapons to do so more efficiently. However the levels are all pretty much the same, and I got bored halfway through the second level.
Now I know I have a bad fear of spoofer I can NOT play this game at all too scary if you don’t have a fear of spiders, maybe you could play ￼
You should buy this game if you don't have arcnaiphbio it is the best game I played I love the Indian Jones reference when the fridge lands in the atomic bomb
Fun for what it is. It's a good game but not BoneLab or Beat Saber good. You just have to judge it on a different scale. It's a chaotic, janky laugh filled game.

The game is very fun and much better then the PC version, but the game is short and once you beat it you have very little reason to replay it as it will get boring after to 3ed play through.
I saw kill it with fire 2 on steam like how the first game is one there

I like the game. It’s like a fun stress reliever. There are a few bugs. Like of how I can’t grab the revolver from the drawer in first contact. But it’s fine. Also I hate it of how I can’t try this thing at home.
Download this game when it was free. Hasn’t worked yet. Will load the credits but will go black and nothing else. Deleted an re-installed but no luck. Meta quest 3s.

Two things: 1. No music sound setting? It was blasting in my ear and I just wanted the music down, but couldn't find it anywhere. 2. It has reverse turning. I'm not sure why devs even have that now-a-days. If I press left to turn the left, I don't want the entire world to turn right... I just want to turn left. Thankfully it was a free game for the month or it would get refunded. 2 very simple fixes that shouldn't even be in games. Anyways, if you don't mind sound settings you can't adjust outside of hardware volume, and you don't mind reverse turning, then it might be okay. Guess I'll never know.

This game has such good graphics but as someone with arachnophobia, even with the settings on, i was not able to play this in vr without having a heart attack. It was very impressive though. If you want a game with a few jumpscares or you just want to get revenge on spiders then definitely get this game. I played this on Xbox and it was much less scary. It is a game where my pyromaniac self can have the time of my life. Enjoy the game!
Great game but one glitch that makes me feel like I wasted 15 dollars is how I can't open it. When I try it shows the logo then closes.

Game is quite interesting,this is another one of those games I was never really interested in but it was one of this month’s Quest+ games. It definitely has a quirky and unique charm to it. I would be lying if I said it isn’t great fun to torch a room and shoot spiders with a shotgun. I like the fact most of the in-game objects can be picked up and used to bludgeon spiders with. This is just one of those type of games I know I wouldn’t enjoy in flatscreen but can really shine in VR. While they are quite a few games I would personally buy before Kill It With Fire,I still recommend this game. It is both enjoyable and hilarious
It’s my favorite game and it’s scary when the spiders jump out at you over all tho it’s a great game

reviews.review_title: WARNING, Game too fun! (And cheesy, MMM)
reviews.review_description:
Summary of review: WARNING, game is filled with violence, spiders, and heaps of fun, Rated M for cheese balls.(MMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMMM)



           Hi, I love this game, it’s great if you like spiders, there is a lot of spiders in this game, please play it, please play it. It’s very entertaining to burn spiders to death, and spoilers, you get a burning circular saw launcher for beating game, great game, would buy again. Also is great game, would buy again. P.S great game, would buy again? Also, if you are scared of spiders, make sure to turn on scary violin noises, improves gameplay QUALITY immensely. Would also buy again. Scary violin noises alerts you when spider near. Is great if he’s hiding under the couch, but it only makes the sound when they running away, so not great if they are hiding under the couch. Also, if under couch, burn the Tv, it distracts them totally. Also also, would buy again. Great game if you like spiders, also great game if you hate spiders, also great game if you scared of spiders. Burning things is very fun IN THIS GAME. Would buy again.  P.S guns are not very effective, hard to aim at spider? Also would buy again, GREAT gamE. Also wish there was multiplayer, then I could burn house down (to kill the spiders of course) and blow up gas stations ( to kill spiders of course) and shoot random flower pots ( not to kill spiders of course) with friends YAAAAAYYYYYY!!!! But can’t do that can I BOOOOOOOOOOOOO!!!! Also could set “friend” on fire (in game of course). Also, great game, would buy again. FYI nuke ending SHOCKED me. Crazy ending, also secret ending cool too, you just can’t kill those things can you? Also, still missing food item apparently, can’t find anywhere, is in gas station, but already got food item. So I can never 100% this game if I really wanted to. Also, great game, would buy again. Also, this one random time on “Unnamed game”(would buy again too) I found diamonds in a giant skeleton under the ground. It was crazy, I had like a stack of 67.5 diamonds, it was pretty crazy, also would buy again, great game. Also made sword and kills GIANT spiders. That was really cool and this game reminded me of it. WARNING: Player discretion is advices, lots of crazy lookin spiders ( VERY SPOOKY) is very spooky game, one time, this one spider jumped out from under this one couch, and scared me really bad this one time. It was very spooky, I went and tried to cry on virtual couch, and fell to floor, very realistic game, mistook fake couch for real couch, very realistic. Also great game, would buy again. Hi, I love this game, it’s great if you like spiders, there is a lot of spiders in this game, please play it, please play it. Also, would buy again, great game. Overall it’s a game changer for kill it with fire. Before there was only a handful of ways to unalive innocent spiders, now there’s infinite possibilities! You could kill a spider with a weedwhacker(Makes this sound “BrrbrrbrrVRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRDSHddddddd”) or you could become a ninja and chuck  shurikens at them (Makes this sound “Thwack, Thwack, Thwack, Thwack), or, you could do what I do, and use use your grandmas urn! Or just your grandma if they’re not dead yet. There are endless possibilities! And another thing, there are huge variety of spider creatures to unalive in this game too! We have mother spiders, it’s like a spider piñata surprise! You bust them open, and you get more spiders!!! Or there’s the baby spiders! They’re very fast and small, so just use bombs! It clears them out very quickly. And my personal favorite, bomb spiders! You kill one, and they kill more! Soon they’ll have a bigger kill streak than you!(Sounds like this when they die”hssssssssssssss  PLGHGGGGGGGGGGGGGG / KABOOM” whichever you prefer) We also have, a new variety of items! They’re called “food” there are many different kinds of “food”, there is food for you! In the form of an energy drink! It slows down time! They won’t know what hit them (It’s a     
shotgun) Then we have “food” for them, there’s basic cheese balls first, which lure them out of hiding so you can explode them! (Sounds like “KABOOM”) Or you can give them flaming hot cheese balls, which lure them out, and make them exploding spiders! So you can explode with a shotgun instead, or a weedwhacker if you prefer. Then, my all time favorite “food” is the royal jelly flavor, this turns them into Supreme Spider Piñata Surprise!!! Then, we have a few new weapons I believe, including the all new vacuum cleaner! Use everyday objects to murder spiders in all new ways never seen before! One more great addition, the fire extinguisher!  Ever found yourself blowing up random, and then, uh oh, you’re surrounded by fire! Or uh oh, your cats on fire, or, uh oh, you need reach escape velocity in just 30 seconds! What do you do? I’ll tell you what you do, you whip out your fire extinguisher, pull the pin ( Don’t worry it’s not a grenade) and in seconds, the fires gone! Your cat might be gone, but at least you reached escape velocity, but uh oh, now you’re falling back down to earth! Don’t worry this game doesn’t have fall damage! That’s because you’re not even supposed to jump! Let alone reach escape velocity! Or, another thing, if you don’t have any books nearby, maybe they burnt to a crisp! But that’s not my problem, this is another great use for the fire extinguisher! You can use it like a fancy metal fly swatter, or in our case, a spider swatter! By far, the worst weapon, is the clipboard. Only does the same stuff as a book you could find on the floor! Or you could just use the more stylish version, the frying pan! Or use your trusty fire extinguisher as mentioned before! By far the best weapon, is the Molotov!  One toss and building on fire! If you still had a cat now it’s not there anymore! And pesky paperwork, as it’ll be gone with the rest of the building, and your cat! Got some pesky family members? Then tell them “Begone!” and chuck one of these bad boys and poof, they’ll be gone in smoke, like your cat! And your grandma, she ever refuse to give you any cookies? Not anymore! It’s the all in one every use item that totally will not just burn relationships, but the people themselves. And that’s just people(And cats)! Imagine the destruction and death when trying it out on a colony of spiders! Imagine the chaos, and while you can sit back and relax and watch everything burn while you don’t take ANY fire damage in this game! An honorable mention is the shotgun! It’s very useful for killing many spiders in one shot, very good spread on fire, works on toast too(Or a cat)! Very good for sniping spiders from across the room, or when they’re right in your face! Ever feel the need to make a book fly using the power of bullets? Try an SMG! You can literally make most things fly by shooting them from beneath into the sky! Another great weapon is the weapon you get for beating everything, it’s a flaming circular saw launcher! Ever want to get rid of those pesky spiders, but one way to kill them just isn’t enough? We’ll try the all new saw launcher! Not only does it effectively work as a massive shuriken launcher, but it also sets things on fire! Effectively killing spiders in two ways at once! And if you shoot at exploding spider, well that becomes three ways! Saw, bomb, and fire! Another one of my all time favorites, Gasoline! You can make a line of it and set it one fire, make a circle of fire, maybe trap a couple spiders in the middle and boom! Entertainment for hours. You could also use it to set off explosives. That’s enough about the weapons, let’s talk about spiders. We have eight types of glorious spider variants, the first cool one being a jumping spider. They hide in drawers and when you least expect it, BOOM, they’re on your face and your screaming for your life, great spiders very good at being spooky. Then we have a duo, first is radioactive spiders, these dudes aren’t very annoying on their own, but when they run near dead spiders, then they become zombie spiders! Now when there was only one problem, you get hundreds! And now you get higher kill counts easy! 

Radioactive spiders, who loves um? YOU DO 👉👉👉👉👍👍👍👍!!! Ever want to become spider man? Too bad, that’s not how it works, but you CAN create an infinite amount of spiders whith them! Already cleared the level but you need a couple more kills? Need to quench your thirst for blood? Well let one of these guys scurry around and you’ll have zombie spiders in no time! Love this game by the way, I can confidently say I would purchase it again. Also, if you read the entire review and remember the Molotov (Only the best weapon in the whole game!) then you’ll love gasoline! If a Molotov doesn’t have enough destructive power to you, say no more! Dribble some gasoline along the floor, then set it to flames then you’ll have at least 50% more destruction GUEANTEED! Also, do you hate your sanity? You do? Wel you’re gonna love invisible spiders too! If you don’t quit the game cause you can’t find that one last spider, then you certainly will when they jump at you out of nowhere!

-That one random guy who has too much free time

      P.s. I love this game, would buy again, 
Also, total spider count of this review is 40!😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱😱
I guarantee you won’t find a better spider count for a review anywhere else! :) :) :) ;) :) :) ;) :) :) :)
Please mark this review as helpful, I would                             love to have this be the first review to pop up when looking at this game. Very helpful indeed, yes yes yes

      P.S.S  Fave stares!!!!!

reviews.review_title: Game is pretty fun. Could havee improvem
reviews.review_description: Like I set in the title the game is pretty fun. We could have some improvements, but after all, it is very satisfying to see the spider, guts fly over the place or whatever that green thing is. I think they should make the guns in more places so you can find it and not put like 20 spiders in a room, somehow hiding and they should put flame throwers and guns and more obvious places they definitely need improvements though and it’s a fun game. Like I said, I think if you like killing bugs, this is the game for you especially if you like killing them with fire.

reviews.review_title: I don’t know what to think of this game
reviews.review_description: I put my review at a 4 stars because this game is GREAT. The only reason I can’t give it a 5 star is because I actually get really scared when the spider run towards you and I actually ended up shutting off my game because I got too scared by it. I can’t decide if I’m having fun playing it or being too scared to have fun. Normally, to avoid getting scared, I just burn down the whole room before looting it. I think to have fun playing, I just have to realize that the spiders aren’t real and to get over it. I also have a question. Is there a string to turn off the creepy spider noises? Like to turn off the squeaking and crawling noises? Over all, would be incredibly fun if the spiders didn’t scare me so much. :)

developer_response.body: Hey! The game has an "arachnophobia mode" under Settings. We recommend you try it. Thank you for playing!
